overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a misty natural hot spring environment with waterfalls and traditional Japanese wooden structures. The character walks from a wooden dock along rocky shoreline paths toward a cascading waterfall, passing NPCs bathing in the turquoise water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden viewing platform by hot spring

events.description: yellow bird flies across the frame from right to left above the hot spring
character steps off wooden dock onto dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock and transitioning onto the rocky shoreline path beside the steaming water

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on rocks at the water's edge, facing the hot spring

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a viewing platform extending over the hot spring water
steaming turquoise water with mist rising from the surface
moss-covered stone wall with dense green vegetation growing on surface
thick white steam rising from the hot spring and drifting across the scene
red glowing lights visible through the mist in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock platform extending over a misty turquoise hot spring. The samurai character walks forward, passing two NPCs sitting by the water's edge, then steps off the wooden planks onto a dirt path. A yellow bird flies across the frame as steam drifts through the air and red lanterns glow in the distant mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline path along hot spring

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the curving path along the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow dirt path between the mossy cliff wall and the hot spring water

notable_agents.action: person standing waist-deep in the hot spring water, bathing

entered.detail: waterfall becoming visible in the distance through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow dirt trail squeezed between a mossy cliff face and the steaming hot spring. A bather stands in the turquoise water to the right. The wooden dock falls behind as the path curves left, revealing a distant waterfall through the mist and moving the cliff wall closer to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall approach with wooden bridge crossing

events.description: character passes the standing woman and continues toward the waterfall
character steps onto wooden bridge structure crossing near the waterfall
character begins ascending the wooden steps of the bridge toward the cliff

agents.ego_description: walking past a woman in traditional dress and climbing the wooden bridge structure toward the cascading waterfall

notable_agents.action: woman in red and black traditional dress with white hair standing with arms crossed, observing the hot spring

entered.detail: multi-tiered waterfall flowing down mossy rocks with heavy mist at its base
rustic wooden plank bridge with railings built along the cliffside near the waterfall
small Japanese-style wooden building with dark roof visible through the mist above the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character passes a woman in traditional dress standing by the path, then approaches a cascading waterfall. The scene transitions onto a wooden bridge structure built along the cliffside, with the character ascending steps toward the top of the falls. A traditional wooden hut is visible through the dense mist, and the sound of rushing water dominates the atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene wooden dock across a steaming shoreline toward the towering heights of a cascading waterfall. It begins on a wooden platform extending over turquoise waters, where the samurai passes resting NPCs and steps onto a dirt path as a yellow bird flits through the drifting steam and glowing red lanterns. As the character proceeds, the path narrows between a mossy cliff face and the hot spring, curving left to reveal the distant falls while the wooden dock recedes into the mist. The scene then shifts as the character passes a woman in traditional dress and transitions onto a wooden bridge structure built along the cliffside. Finally, the camera ascends a series of steps toward the top of the waterfall, passing a traditional wooden hut shrouded in dense mist.
